title: Arrow Collector
description: Pick up the arrows on the ground (not Creative only anymore).
body:
__The introduction below was written by ChatGPT without changing anything. I just found this interesting so lol__

[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)

## Introduction
Arrow Collector is a super lightweight mod for Minecraft Java Edition that adds a unique functionality to enhance your archery experience. Developed by teampotato, this mod incorporates a single mixin to seamlessly integrate its features into the game.

## Description
The Arrow Collector mod focuses on a specific aspect of the game: arrows and their retrieval. With this mod installed, you'll witness a new level of convenience when it comes to collecting arrows fired from your bow. No longer will you need to worry about losing valuable ammunition during intense battles or long-range encounters.

## Functionality
The core functionality of the Arrow Collector mod lies in its ability to modify the behavior of arrows upon release from a bow. By leveraging the power of mixins, the mod intercepts the default arrow release mechanism and introduces a smart feature.

When using a bow without the Infinity enchantment, the mod ensures that any arrows fired will be retrievable. Normally, arrows shot from a non-enchanted bow have a chance of being destroyed upon impact or simply disappearing. However, the Arrow Collector mod takes care of this issue by granting the arrows a special status: they become "pickup-allowed" entities.

What does this mean? It means that when you shoot an arrow using a regular bow, you can rest assured that it will remain intact and ready to be picked up after landing. You no longer need to worry about losing arrows in inaccessible areas or during hectic combat situations. With the Arrow Collector mod, you'll have the chance to retrieve your ammunition and reuse it as needed.
## Conclusion
The Arrow Collector mod brings a small yet impactful enhancement to the Minecraft archery experience. By guaranteeing the retrieval of arrows fired from non-enchanted bows, this mod provides a sense of convenience and conservation. Say goodbye to wasted arrows and embrace a more resourceful approach to combat and exploration. Download the Arrow Collector mod today and ensure that no arrow goes to waste in your Minecraft adventures!
